heroSubtitle: Need help, a solution, immediate assistance?
heroDescription: A local expert responds to you in less than 5 minutes, anywhere in the world... And in your language!
expertsDescription: Less than 5 minutes, and it rings: an expert picks up, wherever you are, in your language.
pricingDescription: Choose who you want to talk to: {strong}a lawyer{/strong}? {strong}An expat{/strong}?
lawyerOfferDescription: A clear, actionable response, adapted to your case.
concreteExamplesDescription: An expert for every need, period.
whyChooseDescription: Designed to be fast, stay clear and really support you: mobile first.
serviceFollowsYou: The service that follows you everywhere.
connectImmediately: Lawyer or expat, we connect you right away.
adaptsToYou: We adapt to you and it's ultra-fast.
joinNetworkDescription: Lawyers or expats: join us and turn your skills into real opportunities.
expatJoinTitle: Share your experience wherever you are in the world
reviewsDescription: Real testimonials, varied situations so everyone can relate.
trustedBy15000Expats: Join more than {strong}15,000 expats{/strong} who trust us to move forward abroad.
appTipDownload: Tip: download the {strong}SOS Expat by Ulixai{/strong} app to go online/offline when you want.
